name: Bhai Sajjan Singh (Hazoori Raagi Amritsar)
body: Bhai Sajjan Singh started learning Kirtan from a very young age from Sant Sarwan Singh Gandharv (Dumeli) and most of his early years were spent learning Gurmat Sangeet. He performed Kirtan sewa at Sultanpur Lodhi, and subsequently became Hazoori Raagi at Sri Harmandir Sahib, Amritsar where he fulfilled this duty for many years. Bhai Sajjan Singh Ji then traveled to the US and eventually started serving in Gurdwara Sant Sagar, where he still continues to do so. If anyone has more recordings of Bhai Sajjan Singh Ji, please contact us.
